description_long: This object is a decorative candle set atop an ornate, swirling metal candlestick holder. The holder features a unique, artistic design with two large, curved arms that spiral upward from a broad, wavy-edged rectangular base. The candle itself is cylindrical and gray, positioned securely on a flat, round platform at the top of the holder. The metal has a dark, bronzed finish with subtle highlights, giving it an antique and elegant appearance. The base is sturdy and slightly textured, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and classic aesthetics, making it suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A gray cylindrical candle sits on an ornate, bronze-finished metal candlestick holder with swirling, artistic curves and a sturdy, wavy-edged base.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the elegant, double-spiral curves of the metal holder and the full face of the candle and platform.
description_view_1: This side view shows the thin profile of the holder, emphasizing the vertical alignment and the rectangular base's shape.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the opposite spiral of the holder, mirroring the front but with the curves oriented in the other direction.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow profile and the candle's centered position on the platform.
